author: doll-agent
content: Created tests/api_proof.rs for both new crates. Covariance: 5 tests covering empirical, shrunk, ledoit-wolf, OAS, MCD, EllipticEnvelope, all 7 helper functions, GraphicalLasso, GraphicalLassoCV. Neural: 3 tests covering MLPClassifier (4 activations × 2 solvers + early stopping), MLPRegressor (2 solvers), BernoulliRBM (transform + gibbs + Transform-trait dispatch). All 8 api_proof tests pass.
